title: Intensely Juicy Canadian Buttermilk Pancakes
description: A sour and juicy Canadian dish featuring buttermilk and beurre-monte, made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, bringing back nostalgic memories of traditional Canadian breakfasts.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, eggs, and melted beurre-monte.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with pure maple syrup and your choice of toppings.
Repeat the cooking process with the remaining batter, adjusting the heat as needed to prevent burning.
